creator: mfechner@FreeBSD.org
text:
I'm sry, but I cannot reproduce this, here my build-log:
https://pkg.fechner.net/data/132amd64-default/2023-06-05_07h19m39s/logs/rubygem-prometheus-client-mmap-0.23.1.log

You maybe want to build your packages with poudriere, to make sure they build in a clean environment. You maybe have unwanted files somewhere in you installation which causes the package generation to fail.

But if you have a solution that fix the problem for you and does not break the poudriere build, I'm more than happy to include it.
